name: mcp-server-document
summary: MCP server for academic document authoring: grant proposals (科研費/JSPS), journal papers (IEEE/IEEJ/APS/Elsevier), research-talk slides + Excalidraw diagram pipeline + meta helpers. 99 diagnostic tools distilled from classical writing books (木下/本多/Wallwork/児島/中島塚本/中安/宮野). 0.9.0 adds OCR-based knowledge ingestion of 宮野『研究発表のためのスライドデザイン』, 15 slide-design principles in presentation/skill.md + new tool presentation_check_color_count_per_slide enforcing the ベース/メイン/アクセント 3-color rule.
